Info

TypedDict for TarProcessRegistry parameters.

class ats_utilities.generator.tar.tar_process_params.TarProcessParams[source]¶

Bases: TypedDict

TypedDict defining parameter types for TarProcessRegistry.

archive_path: str¶
exclude_patterns: Sequence[str]¶
path_replacements: Mapping[str, str]¶
source_dir: str¶
target_dir: str¶
vals: Mapping[str, str]¶
